data.body:
[operator-attested] LANDED-AC ATTESTATION (R4). The advisory->blocking promotion decision is dogfood-gated on the standing per-criterion effectiveness recorder (d8a5); both criteria ship advisory and are auto-monitored. This ticket's landed acceptance criterion is met by:
- Gerrit change: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/811 (change #811)
- Status: MERGED to main
- Verified: +1 (CI: build/test/lint/typecheck green across py3.11/3.12/3.13)
- LLM-Review: +1 (rebar review-bot PASS, advisory-only findings)
- Change-Id: I7f1e8e43fb666c3c423cc7a6d9c50677c04d5902
Both pieces shipped advisory (never block). Bounded live sanity (5 live single-criterion runs, NOT an E2/E3 batch): necessity recall 1.0 over two over-action positives / false-accept 0.0 over a motivated + docs-only negative (runs/necessity_sanity.json); bug 5886 got a light advisory review runner=pydantic_ai (!=exempt), PASS, non-blocking, necessity correctly clean (runs/bug_tier_sanity.json). Post-ship advisory->blocking promotion remains dogfood-gated per docs/plan-review-gate.md.
